title: TimeSpanFormatOption Interface
description: Represents the options for parsing the timespan value.

fields.name: strictness: number
fields.description: Gets or sets the strictness level for parsing the input text value.
remarks: When strictness equal 0, the /^(-?((\d*\.)?\d+)(d|h|m|s|(ms)) *)*$/ will be used.

fields.name: decimalSeparator: string
fields.description: Gets or sets the decimal separator character.
fields.remarks: The default value is the locale’s decimal separator.

fields.name: thousandSeparator: string
fields.description: Gets or sets the thousand separator character
fields.remarks: The default value is the locale’s thousand separator.
